mapper.sql: (SELECT s.* FROM fund_score s INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(score_date) AS max_date FROM fund_score GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = s.fund_id AND m.max_date = s.score_date)

(SELECT pm.* FROM fund_performance_metric pm INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(stat_date) AS max_date FROM fund_performance_metric WHERE period_code = '1Y' GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = pm.fund_id AND m.max_date = pm.stat_date WHERE pm.period_code = '1Y')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_saved_filter ( filter_id, user_id, filter_name, filter_summary, filter_condition, hit_count, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(filter_id), 0) + 1 FROM user_saved_filter), #{request.userId}, #{request.name}, #{request.summary}, #{request.condition}, COALESCE(#{request.hitCount}, 0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO user_recent_fund_view ( view_id, user_id, fund_id, view_time, source_page ) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(view_id), 0) + 1 FROM user_recent_fund_view), #{request.userId}, #{request.fundId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{request.sourcePage} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, fund_id) DO UPDATE SET view_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, source_page = EXCLUDED.source_page
